expectation_1.description: Output contains a structured eval record with 'scenario' field
expectation_1.evidence: Line 3 contains "scenario": "桌面 AI 监控系统（类似 Cozmio）：..."

expectation_2.description: Output identifies 'variable_under_test' as trigger_threshold or proactive reminder trigger
expectation_2.evidence: Line 5 contains variable_under_test describing the agent's proactive reminder trigger eligibility determination framework. Maps to 'proactive reminder trigger' conceptually.

expectation_3.evidence: Line 7 defines baseline as the current system relying entirely on prompt heuristic rules without independent verification, sample sets, or quantitative scoring.

expectation_4.description: Output defines 'variant' (low interrupt prompt after stall)
expectation_4.evidence: Line 8 defines variant as introducing a structured eval framework: fixed sample sets, 6-dimensional scoring, human ground truth annotation, quantitative thresholds, and regression sets.

expectation_5.description: Output contains a 'scores' section with at least task_relevance and interruption_cost
expectation_5.evidence: Lines 23-30 contain scores section with task_relevance (5/5), evidence_grounding (2/5), actionability (4/5), interruption_cost (3/5), hallucination_risk (2/5), and stability (2/5).

expectation_6.description: Output contains a 'finding' field with substantive analysis
expectation_6.evidence: Line 32 contains a finding field with 5 substantive analytical points covering the multi-round nature of the task, model output verification type, blind spots, key improvement directions, and two-layer testing methodology.

expectation_7.evidence: Line 33 contains decision: 'needs_more_cases', which is one of the specified options.
